arts.ttl: The new Champions League format appears to be leveling the playing field. Just ask Man City
arts.sum: The introduction of a 36-team league phase of the competition - replacing eight mini groups of four - has provided shock results and left some of Europe’s giants in danger of early elimination, most notably 2023 champion Manchester City. With Bayern Munich, Juventus and last year’s beaten finalist Borussia Dortmund also in the playoff positions the potential for big teams to be drawn against each other means there could be some unexpected early exits.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury update: Enzo Maresca reveals whether Romeo Lavia issues will lead to new midfielder in January
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca delivers an injury update ahead of Saturday's Premier League fixture at Manchester City, also revealing whether a new midfielder will be signed in January.

arts.ttl: ‘A joke’ – Chelsea interest laughed off by local press, another club nearing move
arts.sum: Yesterday, Gianluca Di Marzio reported Chelsea are pushing hard to sign Hellas Verona midfielder Reda Belahyane. The report indicated that the Morocco international was seen as a replacement for Cesare Casadei, who is on his way out of Stamford Bridge to try and aid his stalled development. arts.ttl: Exclusive: A ‘few’ player sales paves way for £70m Chelsea transfer
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku’s future at Chelsea is yet to remain a guarantee despite having only relatively recently arrived at Stamford Bridge in the summer of 2023 for £52m. The Frenchman was ravaged by injury issues in his opening campaign in English football but has since gone on to enjoy greater availability in 2024/25.
